sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47919" key="qau/maktron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θαύμ-ακτρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n47919.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">money paid to see conjurers' tricks</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:120" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">120</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
